title: Synesthesia Scene Configuration
description: Schema for scene.json in a .synScene directory (Synesthesia Shader Format v1).

TITLE.description: The scene title displayed within Synesthesia. Required.

CREDIT.description: The artist or creator name. Defaults to 'Anonymous' if omitted.

DESCRIPTION.description: A text description of the scene.

IMAGE_PATH.description: Path to the thumbnail image displayed in the scene library, relative to scene.json. Defaults to 'new_scene.png'.

WIDTH.description: Output width in pixels. Compounded with the in-app resolution setting. Defaults to 1920.

HEIGHT.description: Output height in pixels. Compounded with the in-app resolution setting. Defaults to 1080.

GPU.description: GPU intensity hint displayed in the UI. 0 = unset, 1-5 = lightest to most demanding. Does not affect rendering.

CONTROLS.description: GUI controls rendered in the control panel. Each control's current value is automatically available as a uniform in main.glsl.

PASSES.description: Multipass render targets. Each target becomes a sampler2D uniform in main.glsl. Use the PASSINDEX uniform to branch per pass.

MEDIA.description: Texture sampling settings for user media (syn_Media). Currently supports one entry.

IMAGES.description: Image files bundled with the scene. Each becomes a sampler2D uniform in main.glsl. Files must be placed in an 'images/' subdirectory inside the .synScene folder.

CUBEMAPS.description: Cubemap textures bundled with the scene. Each becomes a samplerCube uniform in main.glsl. Sample with texture(NAME, directionVector).

HARD_TRANSITIONS.description: Uniforms that snap to a new randomly-selected value on each song transition. Duplicate values increase their probability of selection.

SMOOTH_TRANSITIONS.description: Groups of uniforms where one is 1.0 ('on') and the rest are 0.0 ('off'). On each song transition, a new member is chosen and the group cross-fades. Pair with GLSL mix().

TextureWrap.description: 'repeat' tiles the texture (default). 'clamp' extends the edge pixel. 'mirror' reflects out-of-range UVs. 'border' samples black beyond the borders.

TextureFilter.description: 'linear' uses bilinear interpolation (default). 'nearest' preserves hard pixel edges. 'mipmap' uses LOD mipmapping - good for scaling and blur effects.

MediaObject.description: Texture sampling options for user media.

Control.description: A GUI control. Its value is available as a uniform in main.glsl under the NAME you provide.

NAME.description: The uniform name in main.glsl. Underscores render as spaces in the GUI label (e.g. 'my_control' -> 'my control').

TYPE.description: The control widget type. Append 'smooth' to most types for interpolated value transitions.

DEFAULT.description: Initial value when the scene loads. Defaults to 0.0. For multi-dimensional controls (xy, color), use an array - a single number will be broadcast across all dimensions. For color controls, prefer DEF_COLOR.

MIN.description: Minimum output value. Defaults to 0.0. For multi-dimensional controls (xy, color), use an array.

MAX.description: Maximum output value. Defaults to 1.0. For multi-dimensional controls (xy, color), use an array.

PARAMS.description: For 'smooth' controls: transition speed. Smaller = slower (~1/PARAMS frames to complete). For 'bang smooth': envelope duration in frames. Defaults to 0.01.

UI_GROUP.description: Control panel group name. A new group is created automatically if the name does not already exist.

DESCRIPTION.description: Tooltip text shown when hovering over the control.

LABELS.description: Dropdown only. Display strings for each option. If omitted, defaults to 'option 1', 'option 2', etc. Can be used alone (values will auto-set to 0, 1, 2, ...).

VALUES.description: Dropdown only. Numeric values passed to the shader per option. Can be used alone (labels will auto-set to 'option 1', 'option 2', etc.).

DEF_COLOR.description: Color controls only. Default [r, g, b] in the 0.0-1.0 range. Use this instead of DEFAULT for color controls.

RenderPass.description: A render target for multipass shading. The target name becomes a sampler2D uniform in main.glsl.

TARGET.description: Name of the render target. Available as a sampler2D uniform in main.glsl. Sample with texture(TARGET, _uv).

WIDTH.description: Buffer width in pixels. Omit to match the scene's root WIDTH.

HEIGHT.description: Buffer height in pixels. Omit to match the scene's root HEIGHT.

FLOAT.description: If true (default), uses RGBA32F 32-bit float precision - recommended for simulations. If false, uses RGBA8 for better performance.

DOUBLE_BUFFER.description: If true, maintains two buffers so the previous frame's result can be sampled without artifacts. Essential for feedback loops and fluid simulations. Defaults to false.

ImageObject.description: An image bundled with the scene. Place files in an 'images/' subdirectory. The image becomes a sampler2D uniform in main.glsl.

NAME.description: Uniform name in main.glsl. Sample with texture(NAME, _uv).

PATH.description: Path to the image file relative to scene.json. Supported formats: .jpg, .jpeg, .png.

CubemapObject.description: A cubemap texture. Becomes a samplerCube uniform in main.glsl.

NAME.description: Uniform name in main.glsl. Sample with texture(NAME, directionVector).

PATHS.description: Exactly 6 image paths relative to scene.json. Order: +X (right), -X (left), +Y (top), -Y (bottom), +Z (front), -Z (back).

HardTransition.description: On each song transition, the named uniform snaps to a new randomly-selected value from the pool. Add duplicate values to increase their probability.

UNIFORM.description: Name of the uniform to transition. Must match a CONTROLS NAME or a manually declared uniform.

VALUES.description: Pool of values to randomly select from on each transition.

SmoothTransition.description: A family of uniforms where exactly one is 1.0 and the rest are 0.0. On each song transition, a new member becomes active and the group cross-fades over DURATION seconds.

UNIFORMS.description: Uniform names in this transition family. Each must match a CONTROLS NAME.

DURATION.description: Cross-fade duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.5.
